About
Direct Pumping

A North Texas septic and environmental pumping company built on doing the job right, being straight with customers, and showing up when it counts.

Our Services
Our Story

Built in
Johnson County.

Direct Pumping was founded right here in Johnson County, Texas — and that matters. We're not a franchise, not a call center dispatching strangers, and not a company that treats every customer like a ticket number.

We started Direct Pumping because we saw how the industry was being done — and knew it could be done better. Better communication. More honest pricing. Actually showing up on time. Treating a homeowner's property with the same care you'd want someone to take with yours.

Over the past several years we've grown our operation, expanded our equipment, and built a reputation across North Texas for being the company people call when they want the job done right the first time.

By the Numbers

What We Stand For

The Direct Pumping
Standard

🤝

Honest & Straightforward

We tell you what we find, what it means, and what it costs. No upselling, no fear tactics, no inflated estimates. Just the facts.

🕐

We Show Up On Time

Your time matters. We give you a real arrival window and we stick to it. If something changes, we call you — not the other way around.

🏆

Quality Over Shortcuts

We do the job right the first time. Cutting corners costs you more in the long run, and that's not how we want to do business.

📍

Local & Accountable

We live and work in North Texas. Our reputation is built here, and we're accountable to this community in a way a national chain never could be.

🌿

Environmentally Responsible

All waste is disposed of at licensed facilities in full compliance with TCEQ regulations. We take our environmental responsibility seriously.

📞

Real Communication

You can actually reach us. We answer calls, respond to messages, and treat every customer like the neighbors they are.

Service Area

North Texas &
Growing

We're based in Johnson County and currently serve the greater North Texas region. As we grow, we're expanding our footprint into Central Texas to bring the same level of service to more communities.

  • 📍
    Headquarters: Johnson County, TX
  • 🗺️
    Current Service Area: North Texas region
  • 🚀
    Coming Soon: Central Texas expansion

Ready to Work With Us?

Whether you need a one-time septic pump, a recurring service contract, or an inspection for a real estate transaction — we're ready to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you fast.

Licensed & Fully Insured

Direct Pumping is fully licensed and insured for all services we provide in the state of Texas. Ask us for documentation — we're happy to provide it.
